case_title: BLONDELL WHITE ET AL VS. KAREN JEW

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-08-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-08-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS WERE PRESENT BY COURTCALL. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

DEFENDANT JEW TO PAY $1500 TO PLAINTIFFS ON FEBRUARY 5, 2016, $3000 NO LATER THAN FEBRUARY 20, 2016, AND $2800 NO LATER THAN MARCH 20, 2016. PLAINTIFFS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
